title: Creator of the Fallen Realm
description: Lil modpack I put/am putting together, based around medieval weapons and gear, exploring and conquering different dimensions and bosses, and beating questlines for each respective portions. So far there's no "end goal" other then beat all the quests.
body:
Creator of a Fallen Realm (CoaFR) a pack I'm working on for fun. As of first uploading this I don't have anything to offer other then the mods I've compiled, I'm workin on learning how to make questline so there's a goal to follow. Mostly the goal will be to beat/conquer all the bosses/dimensions i've added but that might change depending on what I find/am suggested. Other then that this ain't much special, but if you wanna suggest something to the pack then you can join the attached discord (wherever that will be on screen) And suggest mod addition or removal if you feel something doesn't fit, as well as quest suggestions etc.

The main aesthetic I have is medievel, I've got a good half a dozen mods that add weapons and gear as such, nothing too futeristicly involved either such as create or mekanism etc. and to wrap this up the name was suggested by a friend (Insert where the icon came from when i have one XD)
